upgrades.name: gitlab_pat
upgrades.change_description: Expand from glpat-only to all 10 GitLab token types: Personal (glpat), Deploy (gldt), Feed (glft), OAuth (glsoat), Runner (glrt), CI/CD (glcbt), Incoming Mail (glimt), Trigger (glptt), Agent (glagent), OAuth App Secret (gloas), plus Runner Registration (GR1348941 prefix). Upper length expanded to 1024 for glagent tokens.
